# Titan Ridge Talent

> Relationship-first recruiting firm for industrial and corporate teams. Based in Fullerton, California. Founder-led searches across aerospace, manufacturing, logistics, finance, HR, executive search, and more.

Titan Ridge Talent Solutions LLC is an industrial and corporate recruiting firm headquartered in Fullerton, California. We connect employers with vetted candidates through real conversations, not resume blasts. Every search is run personally by founder Adrian Ibarra.

## What we do

- **Industrial recruiting** — Aerospace, Automotive, Food & Beverage, Light Industrial, Manufacturing, Logistics, Skilled Trades, Operations, Warehouses
- **Corporate recruiting** — Human Resources, Executive Search, Finance, Administration, Technology, Sales
- **Direct placements** — full-time roles, single point of contact, no portals or talent-pool middlemen

## How we work

- Every search starts with a real conversation to understand the operation, the team, and the role
- Candidates are personally vetted and interviewed before being forwarded
- We do not run bulk submissions or send unqualified resumes
- We stand behind every placement after the hire

- [Home](https://titanridgetalent.com/) — overview of services and approach
- [About](https://titanridgetalent.com/about) — company story and values

- [Founder](https://titanridgetalent.com/founders) — Adrian Ibarra, founder bio
- [Industries](https://titanridgetalent.com/industries) — full sector breakdown for industrial and corporate tracks
- [Testimonials](https://titanridgetalent.com/testimonials) — client and candidate feedback
- [Contact](https://titanridgetalent.com/contact) — get in touch, by appointment only
